scores.correctness_notes: All key fields covered correctly: override, type, location, services, labels. All three protocol types (loki, opentelemetry, syslog) explained with correct URL formats. Multiple targets concept implied.
scores.hallucination_notes: The charm integration code uses a fabricated event API (event.relation.data[event.app].get('url'), container.add_layer/replan pattern may be real but the loki-push-api relation data access shown is not verified). The '$JUJU_UNIT_NAME' env var interpolation claim is plausible but not in gold standard. Minor: gold standard mentions 'pebble_service' auto-label for loki type and 'service.name' for OTLP, which agent omits. The charm Python code section is extra content beyond scope that may contain inaccuracies.
